original_image_tags: A single page of aged, off-white paper with typewritten text. The page appears to be the back of a carbon copy or a thin onion-skin paper, as the main text is faint, reversed (mirrored), and difficult to read. There are four dark hole-punch marks at the top edge. The bottom of the page contains several blue ink "RECEIVED" stamps from various government departments, oriented at different angles.

elements.description: Multiple stamped markings including 'RECEIVED' stamps with dates (e.g., 'SEP 23 9 48 AM '47', 'SEP 16 4 06 PM '47', 'SEP 17 9 11 AM '47'), 'DEPT OF JUSTICE FBI', 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', 'INVESTIGATIVE DIVISION', 'RECEIVED-LAHO', 'F.B.I.', and 'INTERNAL SECURITY'. The stamps are in black and blue ink and are scattered across the lower half of the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions correctly identify multiple 'RECEIVED' stamps and other departmental stamps in the lower half of the page, but Description A omits specific quoted text while Description B provides detailed quoted text without contradiction.
